title: entandrophragma congoense
intro: Entandrophragma congoense, also known as the Congolese mahogany, is a tree species native to central Africa. It has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Entandrophragma congoense include its potential to alleviate fever, reduce inflammation, and treat skin conditions. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
